description: HISTORICAL, DEPRECATED 2026-07-19: the canonicality flip (see PROVENANCE.md) made the KIT canonical and the game a vendored consumer, so this game-to-kit sync map is frozen as an extraction record. Do NOT run tools/sync_from_upstream.py; it would overwrite canonical kit files with the game's copies. Kept for the port history it documents.

namespace.note: Upstream uses a flat file-scoped namespace VehicleProto. The port rewrites every word-boundary occurrence of the old namespace token to the new one. This is the only automatic transform applied to mechanical files.

modes.mechanical: Differs from upstream only by the namespace rewrite (plus incidental doc-comment cleanups). Safe to auto-port: the tool copies the upstream file, rewrites the namespace, and writes it into the kit.
modes.seamed: Carries a hand-made extraction seam (a rename, a delegate/interface swap, a lifted-out block, or severed game references). Never auto-ported. On drift the tool prints the upstream diff and the operator hand-merges the kit file.

files.seam: PartKitManifest field renamed BodyManifest (PartKit is a severed game token); demo roster reduced to blockout defs
DriveInputs struct + device sampling lifted out into DriveInputs.cs; InputOverride seam added; game-type crefs reworded
extracted from upstream VehicleController.cs (DriveInputs struct + SampleDeviceInputs + gamepad helpers); no standalone upstream file
Parts/ + Testing/VehiclePilot + GameBootstrap severed to CustomBodyBuilder delegate; seat-height + default-driver-seat inlined
UiState.AnyCursorModalOpen read replaced by the CursorModalOpen Func<bool> seam

notMapped.note: Kit files with no upstream source; the sync tool ignores them.
